description: As a science journalist, create 1D latitudinal precipitation profiles across Africa at 20°E to demonstrate the seasonal migration of the Intertropical Convergence Zone (ITCZ), following the brief at ~/Desktop/journalist_brief.txt. Using the precipitation dataset in NASA Panoply, generate profiles for January and July at the specified longitude. Export the plots as PNG files and save a report identifying the precise latitudes of peak precipitation to ~/Documents/itcz_report.txt.
